topic: Theme 3: Communication and the World Around Us
subject: german

items.q: How do you say 'I use my phone every day'?
items.correct: Ich benutze mein Handy jeden Tag
items.misconception: Ich benutze meine Handy jeden Tag
items.random_wrong: Ich benutzen mein Handy jeden Tag
items.why: Students mismatch gender; 'Handy' is neuter, so 'mein Handy', and the verb agrees with 'ich'.
Students translate literally; in this topic it means social media used to communicate.

items.q: Give an advantage of technology for communication.
items.correct: Man kann leicht in Kontakt bleiben
items.why: Students give negatives when asked for advantages; technology helps people stay in touch.
It's The environment. “The phone network” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.
